Name: Sun
Description: Controls directional light (sun) parameters and atmospheric scattering used for sky lighting, color, and environmental illumination.

Fields.Name: Sun Rotation: X
Fields.Description: Controls the vertical rotation (elevation) of the sun, affecting its height in the sky and shadow length.

Fields.Name: Sun Rotation: Y
Fields.Description: Controls the horizontal rotation (azimuth) of the sun, determining its direction across the sky.

Fields.Name: Distance Magnification
Fields.Description: Scales the effective distance of the sun, influencing attenuation and atmospheric scattering calculations.

Fields.Name: Light Source Color: R
Fields.Description: Red channel of the sun’s light color.

Fields.Name: Light Source Color: G
Fields.Description: Green channel of the sun’s light color.

Fields.Name: Light Source Color: B
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the sun’s light color.

Fields.Name: Light Source RGB Magnification
Fields.Description: Overall intensity multiplier applied to the sun’s RGB color.

Fields.Name: Scattering Direction Coefficient
Fields.Description: Controls the anisotropy of atmospheric scattering, affecting how light is preferentially scattered forward or backward.

Fields.Name: Rayleigh Scattering Coefficient
Fields.Description: Controls Rayleigh scattering intensity, responsible for sky color and wavelength-dependent light scattering (e.g., blue sky).

Fields.Name: Mie Scattering Coefficient
Fields.Description: Controls Mie scattering intensity, affecting haze, fog, and light diffusion around the sun.

Fields.Name: Blend Coefficient
Fields.Description: Blends between different atmospheric or lighting states, such as time-of-day transitions.

Fields.Name: Ground Diffuse Reflection RGB Magnification
Fields.Description: Scales the contribution of ground-reflected light (indirect diffuse lighting) affecting ambient illumination.
